name: Summer Beach Mega Bundle — Complete Cozy Pixel Art Set
description:
The COMPLETE Summer Beach Cozy Pack — all 56 sprites in one massive collection! Everything you need to build a gorgeous pixel art beach world.

✨ **Everything Included:**
• 7 Beach Characters — sunny_sun, beach_crab, seagull, jellyfish, sea_turtle, beach_bather, lifeguard
• 8 Food & Drink items — ice_cream, popsicle, lemonade, coconut_drink, hot_dog, watermelon, watermelon_slice, tropical_pineapple
• 18 Gear & Accessories — umbrella, towels, beach ball, surfboard, life ring, snorkel, flippers, bucket, spade, beach bag, wagon, deck chair, hammock, inflatable flamingo, and more!
• 18 Environment & Scenery — palm_tree, sandcastle, seashells, starfish, lighthouse, clouds, sunset, coral_reef, tropical flowers, signs, flag, picnic, ice_cream_truck, and more!
• 5 Tiles — sand, sand/starfish, water, shore, boardwalk

**Style:** PICO-8 inspired 32×32 pixel art with a warm 24-color beach palette.

**Includes:**
• 56 unique sprites (32×32)
• Full sprite sheet strip
• CC0 license — use in any project, personal or commercial

**SAVE 35% vs buying separately!**

**Quality Score:** 8.1/10 — Curator Approved with Distinction
